app.title: CloudEasyFiles
hero.subtitle: A simple interface for navigating cloud connections, exploring resources, and exposing contextual actions based on the selected item.
navigation.title: Connections
navigation.connection_status.unsupported: This provider does not have real connectivity implemented yet.
navigation.empty.title: No connections configured
navigation.empty.description: Start by adding a connection to populate the left navigation tree.
navigation.filter.label: Filter navigation items
navigation.filter.empty: No navigation items match the current filter.
navigation.modal.title: Configure connection
navigation.modal.load_error: Unable to load the selected connection.
navigation.modal.credentials_load_warnin: Stored credentials could not be loaded. Re-enter them to update this connection.
navigation.modal.aws.access_key_placehol: Enter the AWS access key ID
navigation.modal.aws.secret_key_placehol: Enter the AWS secret access key
navigation.modal.aws.cache_directory_hel: When configured, downloaded files are tracked locally so the app can show file status.
navigation.modal.aws.test_connection_hel: Runs a real AWS validation using the credentials provided above.
navigation.modal.aws.test_connection_in_: Testing AWS credentials and required S3 access...
navigation.modal.aws.test_connection_suc: Connection test succeeded. AWS account detected: {accountId}.
navigation.modal.aws.test_connection_mis: The AWS credentials are valid, but this identity cannot list S3 buckets. CloudEasyFiles requires the `s3:ListAllMyBuckets` permission to use this connection.
navigation.modal.aws.test_connection_val: Fill the required AWS fields before testing the connection.
navigation.modal.azure.placeholder_copy: Azure-specific settings are not implemented yet. For now, use AWS connections.
navigation.connections.delete_descriptio: This will remove the saved connection "{name}" from the application. The {provider} account and the files stored there will not be deleted.
navigation.connections.delete_error: Unable to delete the selected connection.
home.title: Home
content.empty.title: Select a connection
content.empty.description: Once connections are configured, the selected item details will appear here.
content.connection.description: This saved connection stores local cache settings locally, while credentials are kept in secure OS storage.
content.container.description: This simulated container represents a real S3 bucket or Azure blob container at the root of the cloud hierarchy.
content.directory.description: This simulated folder is based on object-storage prefixes and matches the folder navigation shown by the product.
content.file.description: This simulated file represents a cloud object with normalized storage, availability, and local cache state.
content.view_mode.label: Content view mode
content.filter.label: Filter visible content items
content.filter.empty: No visible items match the current filter.
content.list.title: Contents
content.list.loading: Loading items from the selected container...
content.list.loading_containers: Loading containers for the selected connection...
content.list.connect_to_load: Connect this provider to load its containers.
content.list.empty_connection: This connection does not have containers available in the current session.
content.list.empty_container: This container does not have immediate items at the current level.
content.list.empty_directory: This folder does not have immediate items at the current level.
content.list.load_error: Unable to load items for the selected context.
content.local_cache.not_configured: No local cache directory configured for this connection
